name: pattern-detector-backend
description: Pattern detection with human-in-the-loop active learning

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n py,node -c blue,green "npm run py:service" "npm run node:dev"
scripts.py:test: py -m unittest tests.test_validator_fixtures tests.test_fundamentals_service tests.test_density_base_detector_v2_pattern tests.test_pattern_framework tests.test_atr_pivot_research tests.test_structure_discovery_pipeline tests.test_structure_discovery_outcomes tests.test_structure_discovery_families tests.test_structure_discovery_inspection tests.test_structure_discovery_multi_symbol tests.test_structure_discovery_stability tests.test_structure_discovery_direction
scripts.test: npm run training:test && npm run vision:test && npm run candidates:test && npm run candidate-semantics:test && npm run candidate-persistence:test && npm run broker:test && npm run chart:test && npm run contracts:test && npm run signal-scanner:test && npm run py:test
